name: 90sRAP
description: Generates edit prompts invoking the aesthetic of early 1990s MTV gangsta rap music videos — low-rider culture, Compton/South Central visual language, VHS grain, bleak suburban sprawl, lowkey menace, oversized streetwear, and the iconic cinematographic palette of Hype Williams' contemporaries.
templates: Transform this image by {edit_operation}. Apply {film_look} to the overall image. {preservation}.
Edit this image to place the subject in a {environment}. {edit_operation}. {integration}. {preservation}.
Apply a {film_look} to this image and {edit_operation}. Ensure {color_grade} dominates the palette. {preservation}.
In this image, {edit_operation}. Dress the subject in {outfit}. {integration}. {preservation}.
Rework this image with {edit_operation}. Add {atmosphere} to the scene. {film_look}. {preservation}.
Using the provided image, place the subject in a {environment} and apply {edit_operation}. {color_grade}. {preservation}.

edit_operation: add heavy VHS tape degradation with tracking errors and scan lines across the frame
apply a sun-bleached color grade typical of early 90s Southern California video production
render the scene in the style of a low-budget 1991 rap video shot on 16mm film
give the image the washed-out daytime look of a Compton street-corner establishing shot
apply a blue-tinted night-shoot grade with underexposed shadows and blown-out streetlights
transform the setting into a sun-drenched Los Angeles suburban street with cracked sidewalks
add a fish-eye lens distortion reminiscent of early 90s rap video cinematography
apply the warm golden-hour haze of a low-rider cruise scene shot on consumer video
give the scene a grimy urban texture with chain-link fences and graffiti-tagged walls in the background
restyle the lighting to flat midday sun with harsh shadows, no fill, shot-on-location feel
transform the background into a housing project courtyard with concrete and faded murals
apply slow-motion stylization with motion blur suggesting a high-speed car scene
add the high-contrast black-and-white treatment of a mid-roll music video interlude
render the image with the oversaturated primary-color palette of an early Hype Williams-era production
give the scene the bleak industrial backdrop of a rail yard or abandoned lot at dusk
apply a security-camera surveillance aesthetic with timestamp overlay and washed-out low-res look
transform the environment into a South Central Los Angeles residential block at golden hour
add a helicopter aerial shot aesthetic with tilted frame and wide-angle street perspective below
apply the handheld shaky-cam documentary style of a street-level 90s rap video shoot
give the image the poolside luxury aesthetic of a West Coast rap video circa 1993
secondary_edit: overlay subtle lens flare streaks across streetlights or sunlight sources
add heat shimmer distortion rising from sun-baked asphalt
introduce cigarette or cigar smoke wisps drifting through the frame
add a low-rider or lowered Impala parked prominently in the background
place a chain-link fence casting diamond shadows across the subject
introduce a boombox or portable speaker in the scene
add graffiti tags or block-letter murals to visible wall surfaces
place a group of figures in the background dressed in period streetwear
add a parked police cruiser in the background mid-distance to establish tension
introduce palm trees silhouetted against a smoggy Los Angeles sky
add a concrete overpass or freeway structure looming in the background
place visible hydraulic-lowered suspension visible beneath a car in frame
add a portable radio or car stereo blasting with visible speaker distortion lines
introduce a convenience store or liquor store signage in the background
outfit: a XXXL white tee, baggy Dickies work pants, and white Nike Cortez sneakers
a Raiders snapback, black Starter jacket, and saggy dark jeans
an oversized flannel shirt buttoned only at the top over a plain white tee and Levi's 501s
a Jheri curl fade, heavy gold chain, and a silk button-up shirt open at the chest
a Kangol bucket hat, Cross Colours color-block jacket, and parachute pants
a black hoodie with hood up, dark Dickies, and black Timberlands
a tracksuit in a primary color with triple-stripe Adidas and a fat gold rope chain
a bandana tied as a headband, sleeveless plaid shirt, and khaki Dickies
a Los Angeles Kings snapback, oversized team jersey, and high-top Reeboks
a leather bomber jacket, black turtleneck, thick rope chain, and slacks
a denim jacket with airbrushed back panel, acid-wash jeans, and Huarache runners
a matching shorts set in a bright color, tube socks, and classic shell-toe Adidas
environment: a sun-scorched Compton residential block with palm trees, cracked asphalt, and low ranch houses
a concrete basketball court at dusk, chain-link backdrop, no nets on the hoops
a South Central Los Angeles alley with dumpsters, graffiti walls, and low afternoon light
a housing project parking lot at golden hour with lowered cars and long shadows
a liquor store parking lot in daytime, hand-painted signs, bars on the windows
a Crenshaw Boulevard strip at night with neon signage and light traffic
a vacant lot in Inglewood at midday, sparse dry grass, broken concrete, distant freeway
an inner-city rooftop at sunset with a Los Angeles skyline smog silhouette
a car wash in Compton on a bright day, suds on the ground, 64 Impala in the bay
a freeway overpass underpass with concrete pillars tagged with graffiti
a high school gymnasium converted into a video shoot set with industrial lighting rigs
a poolside setting in a modest suburban backyard, plastic lawn chairs, chain-link perimeter
a recording studio control room visible through glass, reel-to-reel visible in background
an empty nighttime street lit only by a single working streetlight and distant headlights
film_look: heavy VHS grain, color bleeding at high-contrast edges, slight tape dropout artifacts
16mm film grain with soft focus edges and a warm magenta shadow tint
consumer camcorder video quality circa 1992 with auto-exposure hunting and blown highlights
a sun-bleached look with lifted shadows, desaturated greens, and dusty yellow highlights
a blue-tinted underexposed night-shoot look with halation around light sources
a high-contrast black-and-white conversion with deep crushed blacks and blown sky
a fisheye lens geometric distortion with vignetting and slight chromatic aberration at edges
an oversaturated punchy look with electric blues, acid greens, and deep reds
a flat washed-out daytime look with no contrast, simulating consumer video in bright sun
a film-burned double-exposure effect suggesting a low-budget editing suite transition
a slow shutter judder effect suggesting frames shot at 18fps on a budget film camera
a broadcast-quality analog look with color bars artifact at the frame edge and field interlacing
color_grade: a warm amber and burnt orange palette evocative of a Los Angeles smog sunset
a cool blue and grey night palette with yellow sodium streetlight accents
a high-saturation primary palette with dominant red and black
a bleached-out midday look with cyan shadows and yellow highlights
a teal and orange split-toning with pushed contrast
a monochrome near-black-and-white with one accent color retained
a golden hour palette with deep red shadows and glowing warm highlights
a murky green-grey shadow palette with blown white highlights
atmosphere: hazy smog diffusion softening the horizon and distant structures
heat shimmer rising from asphalt creating low distortion in the background
a pall of cigarette or cigar smoke catching the light
low rolling fog or marine layer hugging the ground at ankle height
dust particles catching a single shaft of afternoon sunlight
the oppressive stillness of a midday summer heat with no wind
harsh directional shadows from overhead sun with no fill light
a sodium vapour orange cast over the entire scene from distant streetlights
integration: match the VHS color bleed to the existing image's white balance and tone
ensure the grain structure is consistent across the full frame including the subject
blend the environmental additions so they read as original background elements, not composites
match the lighting direction on added elements to the key light already present on the subject
ensure the color grade affects both subject and background uniformly for a cohesive single-source look
apply the film artifact layer over the entire image including the subject without masking
maintain tonal continuity between the edited background elements and the existing foreground
ensure added atmospheric elements like smoke or haze interact correctly with existing light sources
preservation: preserve the subject's facial identity, likeness, and expression without alteration
keep the subject's original pose and body positioning intact
maintain the original composition and framing of the shot
do not alter the subject's skin tone or facial features
retain the original aspect ratio and do not crop or reframe the image
keep all existing text or graphics in the frame legible and unaltered
preserve the subject's hands and any objects they are holding exactly as they appear
do not change the number of people visible in the original image
